title: feat(code-sandbox): add queueId concurrency limit
known_problem: Full code-sandbox tests can mix candidate regressions with unrelated environment noise; this config scopes to queueId tests and code-sandbox build.

commands.name: toolchain
commands.shell: node --version && npm --version && pnpm --version && git --version && rg --version | head -1

commands.name: prepare_sdks
commands.reason: Rebuild generated SDK dist files before code-sandbox tests and build.

commands.name: code_sandbox_queue_unit
commands.shell: pnpm exec vitest run test/unit/queue-id-limiter.test.ts -c vitest.config.ts
commands.reason: Best-effort PR-specific unit test. It is tied to the baseline's new queue-id-limiter file name, while a candidate implementation may choose a different helper/module name.

commands.name: code_sandbox_api_integration
commands.shell: pnpm exec vitest run test/integration/api.test.ts -c vitest.config.ts
commands.reason: Cover queue isolation API behavior; failures usually indicate candidate patch regression.

commands.name: build_projects_app_best_effort
commands.reason: Best-effort service caller diagnostic, not the primary gate for this PR.
